taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Power BI, Data Modeling, DAX, Report Development, SQL
skill_match_scores: Power BI:0.0, Data Modeling:1.0, DAX:0.5, Report Development:0.0, SQL:1.0
must_have_quals: Strong experience in Power BI, including data modeling, DAX, and report development, Advanced SQL skills for query optimization, troubleshooting, and data extraction, Solid understanding of data analysis, data profiling, and data validation techniques, Ability to translate business needs into technical solutions, Excellent communication skills for collaborating with business stakeholders and technical teams, Familiarity with enterprise BI best practices and reporting standards, Proven ability to work independently and in a team, including with remote team members, Commitment to compliance with organizational policies, standards, and methodologies
core_responsibilities: Translate business needs into clear, actionable technical specifications, Design, develop, and maintain enterprise-grade Power BI dashboards, reports, and datasets adhering to industry best practices, Review, interpret, troubleshoot, and optimize SQL queries; write clean, maintainable code with proper structure, comments, and design considerations, Validate report data for accuracy and consistency to build trust in BI solutions; provide feedback to internal and external data sources, Demonstrate proficiency with business intelligence (BI) tools and technologies, Conduct source data analysis including data profiling, validation, conceptual and logical data modeling to ensure data quality and suitability, Collaborate with subject matter experts (SMEs) to understand business concepts, processes, and terminology, Partner with stakeholders to develop business requirements that lead to successful project outcomes and innovative solutions, Follow project methodology, change management processes, and departmental procedures, Work effectively in a team environment, including with remote team members
job_summary: SysTechCorp Inc is seeking a Power BI/Analytics Developer to translate business needs into technical specifications and develop enterprise-grade Power BI solutions. The role involves designing dashboards, optimizing SQL queries, and collaborating with stakeholders to ensure data quality and project success.
